fieldUpdates.description: Sets Approval Status to Pending Approval when submitted for approval.
fieldUpdates.name: Opportunity Lock On Submit

fieldUpdates.description: Sets Approval Status to Approved when the approval process is completed.
fieldUpdates.name: Opportunity Approved Field Update

fieldUpdates.description: Reverts the stage to Advance Paid and sets Approval Status to Rejected when the approval is rejected.
fieldUpdates.name: Opportunity Rejected Stage Revert
